trans-unit.note: Does it have to be "trophies" here and in the other three strings, not "achievements"?
@San_Sany4 PlayStation has trophies

@Voytek I know that, but will it be a Playstation-exclusive "trophy", or the other platforms (Steam, Xbox) will have it as well? Given an existence of "short <100 chars" string version, which is a Xbox limitation, I presume they will have it. But there they typically don't call it "trophies", they call it "achievements".

This one is indeed for the PlayStation platinum only. Xbox won't have it. And the <100 is indeed the Xbox limitation, but we didn't bother to change the whole system nor the context comments just for this single one. I guess it should not be a problem here either, as the description is so short anyway. Hope this helps. Thanks.

trans-unit.note: Didn't get this one's meaning.

@Eryman That's a saying, meaning "whatever makes you happy", "whichever way you prefer", or similar. Also, it includes boat, which is just a word play relevant to ports (see achievement_sc_container_ports_DESC what this achievement is about).

trans-unit.note:
Won't it look better if it said "to any X" instead of "to at least 1 X" in achievements like this?
Also, are those "at least" words even necessary? Delivering to 3 ports will not disqualify you from achievement, as you would get it on the 1st port delivery.

trans-unit.source: Deliver cargo from West Balkans in order: Ore, Al Ingots, Electrical Wiring, Electronics, Campervans
trans-unit.target: 서발칸반도에서 명시된 순서대로 화물을 배송하십시오: 광석, 알루미늄 주괴, 전선, 전자 제품, 캠핑카

context-group.context:
NEW_ACHIEVEMENT_29_23_SHORT
Id: NEW_ACHIEVEMENT_29_23_SHORT Short version of achievement description for Euro Truck Simulator 2. Must fit within 100 characters. If the translation of the standard description already fits, this one can be identical. Otherwise it must be translated and shortened to fit.

trans-unit.note: It is NOT possible to fit this into 100 characters.

I would rather have previous strings and then add a tag somewhere that refers to West Balkans DLC name if it's possible like those with requiring DLC name was added separately recently. Difficult to translate with West Balkans included, but anyway long description only has this West Balkans can possible work.

Technically, the people will have means of figuring out which DLC is this achievement for. However, they wouldn't know that the cargoes have to be from the cities in that DLC, so I am afraid we have to keep that part. So, in this case, I think the only way to get it in there is to go "cryptical", and say something like "Deliver cargoes from West Balkans in order to make a campervan" and people will have to figure it out (or more likely, these days, just look it up on the internet).
Yes, I know this sucks, but unfortunately there is no way for us to work around this low limit and we want to keep the achievements the same on all platforms if possible. So sorry for the pain it causes and thanks for understanding.

trans-unit.source: Sights and Legends

Id: NEW_ACHIEVEMENT_61_9_DESC Achievement description for Euro Truck Simulator 2 shown on the Steam website (http://steamcommunity.com/stats/227300/achievements/). Use the same units as in the English version. Translation can be something corresponding to the idea of the original title in your language or culture. The titles usually have somewhat satirical tone.

trans-unit.source: Complete excellent deliveries in this order and direction: Ivalo - Kiruna - Svolvær
trans-unit.target: 이 순서와 방향으로 훌륭하게 배송을 완료 하십시오: 이발로 - 키루나 - 스볼베르

context-group.context:
NEW_ACHIEVEMENT_61_9_SHORT
Id: NEW_ACHIEVEMENT_61_9_SHORT Short version of achievement description for Euro Truck Simulator 2. Must fit within 100 characters. If the translation of the standard description already fits, this one can be identical. Otherwise it must be translated and shortened to fit.

trans-unit.source: Sailor

trans-unit.source: Complete 3 deliveries from Istanbul which are at least 2,500 km long (requires Road to the Black Sea and Going East DLCs)
trans-unit.target: 이스탄불을 기점으로 하며 운송 거리가 최소 2,500km 이상인 화물을 세 번 운송하십시오 (Road to the Black Sea DLC 와 Going East! DLC 가 필요함)

trans-unit.source: Complete deliveries between following cities, in this order and direction: Paris-Strasbourg, Strasbourg-Munich, Munich-Vienna, Vienna-Budapest, Budapest-Bucharest, Bucharest-Istanbul (requires Road to the Black Sea and Going East DLCs)
trans-unit.target: 명시된 경로에 배차된 화물을 나열된 순서대로 배송하십시오 : 파리-스트라스부르, 스트라스부르-뮌헨, 뮌헨-빈, 빈-부다페스트, 부다페스트-부쿠레슈티, 부쿠레슈티-이스탄불 (Road to the Black Sea DLC 와 Going East! DLC 가 필요함)
